rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF HELENA NICKOLAS GRIBANOWSKI
rulings.Calendar Matter: Cross Defendants Rayaks Demurrer And Motion To Strike To Cross Complainants Cross Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Hearing continued to Friday, July 1, 2011 at 10:00 a.m. Demurrer to First, Fourth and Fifth Causes of Action are sustained with leave to amend. Demurrer to Second and Third Causes of Action are sustained without leave to amend. Motion to Strike is denied. If any party wishes to contest the tentative ruling, they must contact the probate courtroom clerk at (415) 551-3702 and opposing counsel no later than 4:00 p.m. on June 30, 2011.
